title: Sea Cucumber Sperm Extraction from Gonads
author: Jon Eilers
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5pbg5in

steps.title: Secure mesh (panty hose or other...
steps.instruction: Secure mesh (panty hose or other mesh like material) to top of funnel and place funnel into a falcon tube

steps.title: Place gonads onto mesh and begin...
steps.instruction: Place gonads onto mesh and begin gently mashing with surgical spatula An opaque fluid should begin accumulating in the bottom of the tube
